sourceList.title: A History of Northumberland: The topography and local antiquities, arranged ... By John Hodgson, John Hodgson-Hinde

zh.lifeSummary: Hotue de Insula是William de Insula的兒子，出生。他至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Hotue de Insula是William de Insula的儿子，出生。他至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Insula
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Galician: habitational name from any of the places called Insua, meaning ‘island, peninsula (of a river or of the sea), land by a river’, from Latin insula ‘island’.

nameMeanings.name: Hotue
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Mohammed, Mohammad, Enamul, Akm, Azizul, Fazlul, Abul, Anwarul, Kazi, Mahbubul, Samsul, Shahidul.

variants.name: Haque
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Mohammed, Syed, Mohammad, Shamsul, Anwarul, Muhammad, Abdul, Izhar, Badrul, Fazlul, Inam, Abu.
Muslim: variant of   Haq  . Compare   Hoque  .

en.lifeSummary: Hotue de Insula was born as the son of William de Insula. He had at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Hotue de Insula est né, fils de William de Insula. Il a eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Hotue de Insula wurde, als Sohn von William de Insula geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Hotue de Insula è nato il come figlio di William de Insula. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Hotue de InsulaはWilliam de Insulaの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Hotue de Insula(은)는 William de Insula의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Hotue de Insula nasceu filho de William de Insula. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Hotue de Insula родился. Его отца звали William de Insula. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Hotue de Insula nació como hijo de William de Insula. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo.

th.–: ถึงแก่กรรม
th.–Male: ถึงแก่กรรม
th.1164–Male: ปี1164–ถึงแก่กรรม
